name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: Irving, TX's PLS Check Cashers at 1701 W Irving Blvd provides 24-hour check cashing services.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers operates at 1701 W Irving Blvd, a standalone location in Irving, TX. This 24-hour check cashing store is available seven days a week, making it accessible anytime you need financial services in Irving.

At this Irving, Texas location, PLS Check Cashers provides check cashing, money services, and other financial solutions. Call the store at 214-492-0587 to confirm services or speak with staff about your specific financial needs.

If you live or work in Irving, TX, PLS Check Cashers is a convenient stop for urgent check cashing. Bring a valid ID and your check—staff can often process your request quickly at the W Irving Blvd location.
pros: 24/7 operation across most service categories including check cashing and money orders
Multi-state presence with 11 states served and multiple physical locations
Integrated vehicle registration and title transfer services alongside financial services
Ria Money Transfer partnership enabling domestic and international money transfers
Government benefits access and foreign exchange services
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard with mobile app for account management
Notary services available for legal documents including wills, deeds, and power of attorney
cons: No fee transparency on website—check cashing and service costs not disclosed
No credit-building products, credit monitoring, or financial counseling services offered
Limited information about Xpectations! debit card benefits, features, or approval criteria
No online check cashing or remote services mentioned; in-person visits required
Company does not address or help consumers build credit history
best_for: Unbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing and cash access
Individuals requiring money transfer services combined with in-person convenience
Vehicle owners needing registration, title, and financial services in one location
Consumers seeking 24/7 notary and document services
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate check cashing, money transfers, and 24/7 financial access without credit requirements. The primary caveat is that the company does not offer credit-building services, financial counseling, or debt relief—it functions as a transaction-based service provider, not a financial coaching or credit improvement resource.
meta_description: PLS Check Cashers at 1701 W Irving Blvd, Irving, TX. Open 24 hours for check cashing services.
